title: ML Buch Shares New Untitled Track She Started A Decade Ago
author: Danielle Chelosky

The post ML Buch Shares New Untitled Track She Started A Decade Ago appeared first on Stereogum.
full_text:
In December, ML Buch contributed vocals to Oliver Coates' Pillion soundtrack and the month before that she was on Smerz's stacked Big city life EDITS. Now, the Copenhagen experimental-pop artist is sharing a new untitled song on her YouTube channel with the caption, "felt like finishing this track from 2016."

Earlier this week Buch received a shoutout from Oklou, who mentioned Suntub in an interview at the McQueen Paris Fashion Week show. Buch also has a short EU/UK tour coming up. Check out the dates below along with the untitled tune.

TOUR DATES:
04/01 – Berlin, DE @ HAU1
04/10 – Bristol, UK @ Saccade Festival @ Trinity Arts Centre
04/18 – London, UK @ NTS 15 @ Earth
04/23 – Bergen, NO @ Ekko
04/24 – Oslo, NO @ Munch
05/21 – Copenhagen, DK @ Nørrebro Teater
